76296.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Crypto bill edges closer to a Senate vote
76296.body:
Jack Mallers leaves Twenty One as Strike exits Tether's three-way bitcoin merger | Washington judge blocks Kalshi's sports prediction markets over state gambling laws | UK parliamentary group launches probe into crypto sector's banking challenges | Telegram plans 'largest rollout of a non-custodial crypto wallet in human history' |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Daniel Kuhn

Happy Tuesday! *Bitcoin* is back above $66,000, though *Bitfinex* analysts caution that the rally is approaching a key $68,000 resistance zone, where underwater holders could sell at breakeven, as U.S. spot ETF flows stabilize and expectations for delayed *Fed* rate cuts leave the broader recovery on uncertain footing.

In today's newsletter, *Trump* agrees to *Clarity Act* ethics provisions, *Jack Mallers* steps down as *Twenty One* CEO, *Kalshi* faces another state-level setback, and more.

Meanwhile, *Malaysia* shuts down ( https://www.theblock.co/post/409076/malaysia-shuts-down-balaji-srinivasans-network-school-forest-city?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *Balaji Srinivasan's Network School* in *Forest City*.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*👀 Trump agrees to ethics provision as crypto bill inches closer to Senate vote*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/409000/trump-agrees-to-ethics-provision-crypto-bill?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*President Trump* agreed to ethics language for the *Clarity Act* , potentially clearing the final hurdle to passing comprehensive U.S. crypto legislation, an industry source told The Block.

* Ethics has been the last sticking point on the bill, which would regulate digital assets federally for the first time and split oversight between the *SEC* and *CFTC*.
* The provision would limit how presidents, members of Congress, and other federal officials can profit from digital assets while in office.
* The dispute centered on Trump's memecoins and his family's DeFi firm *World Liberty Financial* , whose disclosures last month showed he earned millions, intensifying the ethics debate.
* Bill text is expected in the coming days, though Democrats reportedly haven't seen it yet, with the Senate facing an early-August deadline to vote.
* If the Senate passes the bill, it heads back to the House before reaching Trump's desk.

READ FULL ARTICLE ( https://www.theblock.co/po

76294.subject: RWAs are exploding: Here's the full DeFi Active TVL picture
76294.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/acbeaee3-d2ae-4169-b93e-128e14318f8e/top_binance.png?t=1784642038)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/research/report/binance-exchange-to-infrastructure-cexs-reshaping-global-market-access)
Caption: 

Welcome to the DefiLlama Newsletter. Each week we bring you the most valuable onchain insights from the the deepest DeFi dataset in the world.



Subscribe (https://newsletter.defillama.com)





Today’s analysis features brand new [RWA Net Flow charts](https://defillama.com/rwa?chartType=flows&flowHeatmapSize=defiActiveTvl&flowRotationFrequency=daily). Use this tool to track where money is moving between RWAs over time. See flows between chains, asset groups, categories and platforms.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/62cf4898-2409-44d0-a8f2-6380b0f09dee/image.png?t=1784587718)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/rwa?chartType=flows&flowRotationBy=chain)
Caption: 

See Weekly RWA Flows (https://defillama.com/rwa?flowRotationView=heatmap&flowRotationFrequency=weekly&flowHeatmapSize=activeMcap&flowRotationBy=platform)

## RWAs see largest inflow day on record

RWAs just recorded the largest single day of inflows. $1.4b was added to [Franklin Templeton’s iBENJI](https://defillama.com/rwa/asset/iBENJI) on BSC (an institutional liquidity fund), a major contributor to RWAs having their first ever +$1b inflow day.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/b156ad49-bc55-4b79-83e7-7a2ab9c66a8e/rwa-time-series-chart-net-flows-all_2026-07-20__1_.png?t=1784581504)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/rwa?flowRotationFrequency=weekly&flowRotationBy=chain&chartType=flows)
Caption: 

This brings BSC’s Total RWA Onchain Market Cap to over $5b. Only Ethereum’s RWA Onchain Mcap is higher, [owning over half the total market](https://defillama.com/rwa?chartType=flows&flowRotationView=heatmap&flowRotationBy=chain&flowRotationFrequency=weekly) at $16.3b onchain.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9e5ab7ec-06a7-42c7-b261-dcda4b67d269/rwa-net-flow-chain-weekly-heatmap_2026-07-20.png?t=1784582854)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/rwa?chartType=flows&flowRotationView=heatmap&flowRotationBy=chain&flowRotationFrequency=weekly)
Caption: RWA 7d Net Flow

## DeFi Active TVL recovers to all-time highs

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d5b02bd8-5aca-4bb8-9fc4-7381d019b60c/rwa-time-series-chart-defi-active-tvl-all_2026-07-21.png?t=1784646634)
Caption: 

During the rsETH exploit, Maple Finance proactively unwound syrupUSDC & syrupU

Автор: AI NOW & BEYOND

Today in AI NOW & BEYOND 🔥 Put a face on your AI, and let it do the talking AWS Billing Bug Shows Customers Owe Billions in False Charges AI Highlights of the Week Too Important to Miss Put a face on your AI, and let it do the talking Sponsored Chatbots and voice-only agents are dead. A Tavus PAL is an AI video agent that empathises with your users, seeing, hearing, and responding face-to-face in real time. Build one in 5 mins with zero code. Just describe your usecase in a few sentences (support rep, onboarding guide, SDR, tutor, etc.) and deploy it to your site, app, or Google Meet in a few clicks. Attach your knowledge base so your PAL knows everything it needs. See why Salesforce uses Tavus on their landing page to educate, convert, and retain customers. Use TAVUS50 for 50% off! Start Building AI Video Agents - 50% Off AWS Billing Bug Shows Customers Owe Billions in False Charges Amazon says inaccurate estimates do not reflect actual usage as engineers work on a fix Amazon is fixing an AWS billing portal bug that displayed enormous estimated charges for services customers never used. Some accounts showed bills ranging from millions of dollars to nearly $2.5 billion, but Amazon says the figures are inaccurate and will not become real charges. Key Points: False Billing Estimates: Some AWS customers saw estimated monthly bills worth millions or billions of dollars despite no corresponding cloud usage. Billing System Bug: Amazon linked the issue to a recent change in its billing computation subsystem. Rollback Failed: An initial attempt to reverse the change did not fix the problem, forcing AWS engineers to continue investigating. Customers Not Actually Charged: Amazon said the estimates do not reflect real usage or legitimate charges, meaning affected customers should not owe the displayed amounts. Account Impact Unclear: Amazon has not said whether any customer accounts were suspended or restricted because of the faulty billing alerts. Why It Matters: AWS billing data affects budgets, automated spending controls, and access to critical cloud systems. Even when the charges are not real, errors of this scale can cause panic, trigger internal alerts, and potentially disrupt businesses that rely on accurate cloud cost monitoring. Bo Franklin

Senior digital editor



 Britain’s new prime minister talks of a new era of belief and possibility. He is yet to say what he plans to do. Andy Burnham has so far sacked the closest allies of his predecessor and announced a tax tweak, albeit a small one, to make electricity cheaper. His big ideas for change, which he calls a “ten-year plan”,

may not come soon .

76289.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-21-oleh-bezuhlyi-uhz2f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BNlg2o6YCSluMOCpg2Wc45g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3_Onk_KC4LTck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mruuuhlr~a2-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mruuuhlr-a2
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Market sentiment is bullish as Bitcoin rallies on U.S. regulatory progress and Telegram’s massive wallet integration. Institutional engagement hits record highs at Schwab, while Russia formalizes crypto use for international trade to bypass sanctions. 📈Bitcoin rallies as Bessent signals Clarity Act nearing Senate passage Bitcoin is surging as Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent advocates for the passage of the CLARITY Act before the August recess. The legislation is seen as a major catalyst for regulatory certainty in the U.S. market. Read full story 🏛️Russia’s parliament passes crypto market law with $3,800 annual cap for retail investors The Kremlin has officially authorized companies to use digital tokens for bypassing international trade sanctions and global hurdles. While retail investors face new annual caps, the law marks a significant shift in Russia's economic strategy. See details 📱Telegram to launch non-custodial Gram wallet for over 1 billion users this summer Telegram is integrating a non-custodial Gram wallet into its platform, enabling zero-fee crypto transactions for its massive global user base. This move aims to bring seamless decentralized finance directly to over one billion monthly active users. Read full story 💰Charles Schwab posts record quarter as retail trading jumps 57% Charles Schwab reported record Q2 2026 revenue of $7.1 billion, fueled by a massive surge in retail trading. The firm has successfully expanded into spot crypto offerings, capturing significant interest from mainstream investors. Read full story ⚖️SEC And CFTC Open Joint Consultation On Crypto Derivatives Rules In a rare display of inter-agency cooperation, the SEC and CFTC have launched a joint consultation to define rules for crypto derivatives. This effort aims to provide much-needed clarity for institutional players in the derivatives market. See details 🚨Dogechain to sunset on August 8, users must withdraw assets immediately Dogechain has announced it will permanently shut down its operations on August 8, 2026. Users are urged to withdraw all bridged DOGE and other assets immediately to avoid total loss of funds. Read full story ⚙️Nvidia chips reach customers as company cements 80% grip on AI GPU market Nvidia continues to dominate the data-center GPU market, holding an 81% share as its latest AI chips ship
